context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct search flags and filter combinations, presents search results as a properly formatted numbered list with required fields, presents list-style data as a formatted table, and suggests follow-up actions.

checklist.name: Text search flag
checklist.description: Text search uses `short search -t "<text>"` with the `-t` flag (not positional argument or other flag)

checklist.name: Owner filter flag
checklist.description: Filtering by owner uses `-o "<mention>"` (or `-o me` for current user)

checklist.name: Combined filters
checklist.description: Multiple filter conditions are combined in a single `short search` command rather than running multiple separate searches

checklist.name: Numbered list format
checklist.description: Search results are presented as a numbered list (1., 2., 3., etc.) rather than bullet points, tables, or plain lines

checklist.name: ID in results
checklist.description: Each search result entry includes the story ID

checklist.name: Title in results
checklist.description: Each search result entry includes the story title

checklist.name: State in results
checklist.description: Each search result entry includes the story state

checklist.name: List formatted as table
checklist.description: When listing labels, teams, iterations, or projects (non-search collections), output is presented as a formatted table rather than a numbered list or plain text

checklist.name: Follow-up suggestions present
checklist.description: After presenting each set of results, the response suggests at least one relevant follow-up action

checklist.name: Prerequisite check
checklist.description: Runs `which short && short --version` before any search operation
